headline: Kimberly Clark (KMB) Rebound Puts Its Margin Story And Valuation Back In Focus
summary: Kimberly-Clark (KMB) is back in focus after recent share price moves, with the stock showing mixed returns over different periods and drawing attention to how its consumer products business is currently being valued. See our latest analysis for Kimberly-Clark. At a share price of $108.48, Kimberly-Clark has seen its short term momentum build, with a 30 day share price return of 5.77% and a 90 day gain of 12.30%, even though the 1 year total shareholder return declined 10.20%. If recent moves...
